burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate due to pain and gait impairment

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical neuropathic symptoms and exam; nerve conduction studies when available; evaluate reversible causes

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate; depends on etiology control and pain management

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Clinical diagnosis in primary care; EMG/NCS in tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Treat underlying cause, glycemic control, neuropathic pain meds, physiotherapy and fall prevention
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Limited access to EMG and neurology services outside metros
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable medications and diabetes programs in many regions
